detectors.description:
AuxidienOracle.isStale(uint256) (contracts/AuxidienOracle.sol#325-328) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- lastUpdateAt == 0 (contracts/AuxidienOracle.sol#326)

elements.name: require(bool,string)(block.timestamp >= lastUpdateAt + minUpdateInterval,Oracle: update too soon)

detectors.description:
AuxidienOracle.setPricePerOzE6(uint256) (contracts/AuxidienOracle.sol#197-221) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- lastUpdateAt != 0 && minUpdateInterval > 0 (contracts/AuxidienOracle.sol#201)
	- require(bool,string)(block.timestamp >= lastUpdateAt + minUpdateInterval,Oracle: update too soon) (contracts/AuxidienOracle.sol#202-205)
detectors.markdown:
[AuxidienOracle.setPricePerOzE6(uint256)](contracts/AuxidienOracle.sol#L197-L221) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [lastUpdateAt != 0 && minUpdateInterval > 0](contracts/AuxidienOracle.sol#L201)
	- [require(bool,string)(block.timestamp >= lastUpdateAt + minUpdateInterval,Oracle: update too soon)](contracts/AuxidienOracle.sol#L202-L205)

elements.name: require(bool,string)(msg.sender == s.beneficiary || msg.sender == owner(),Vesting: not authorized)

detectors.description:
AuxiVesting.release(uint256) (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#201-218) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(scheduleId < schedules.length,Vesting: invalid schedule) (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#202)
	- require(bool,string)(! s.revoked,Vesting: schedule revoked) (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#205)
	- require(bool,string)(msg.sender == s.beneficiary || msg.sender == owner(),Vesting: not authorized) (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#206-209)
	- require(bool,string)(releasable > 0,Vesting: nothing to release) (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#212)

	Dangerous comparisons:

	- [require(bool,string)(! s.revoked,Vesting: schedule revoked)](contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#L205)
	- [require(bool,string)(msg.sender == s.beneficiary || msg.sender == owner(),Vesting: not authorized)](contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#L206-L209)
	- [require(bool,string)(releasable > 0,Vesting: nothing to release)](contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#L212)

detectors.description:
AuxiVesting.revoke(uint256) (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#248-275) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(scheduleId < schedules.length,Vesting: invalid schedule) (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#249)
	- require(bool,string)(s.revocable,Vesting: not revocable) (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#252)
	- require(bool,string)(! s.revoked,Vesting: already revoked) (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#253)
	- unreleased > 0 (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#259)
	- remaining > 0 (contracts/AuxiVesting.sol#269)
